import sympy as sp

x, y_A = sp.symbols('x y_A', real=True)
y_B = sp.sqrt(1/sp.S(2) - x**2/4)
V = (1/x - x/sp.S(2))**2
U = (x/sp.S(2) + 1/x)**2

eq = 4*U*(2 + y_A*y_B) - V*(y_A + y_B)**2

sol = sp.solve(eq, y_A)
print("y_A solutions:", sol)

R_A_sq = sol[0]**2 + V
r_B_sq = y_B**2 + V

print("R_A^2:", sp.simplify(R_A_sq))
print("r_B^2:", sp.simplify(r_B_sq))

print("Is R_A^2 = something simple?")
